overview.label: Overview
overview.description: Shift landing: queue status, lane alerts, and dependency health.

runLane.label: Run lane
runLane.description: Process a vehicle through a lane — from capture to decision and barrier control.

reviewQueue.label: Review queue
reviewQueue.description: Pick up and resolve cases that need manual confirmation.

sessionHistory.label: Session history
sessionHistory.description: Search sessions, decisions, barrier events, and evidence over time.

laneMonitor.label: Lane monitor
laneMonitor.description: Live lane health, barrier status, and latest session state by site.

deviceHealth.label: Device health
deviceHealth.description: Device heartbeats and degradation by site and lane.

syncOutbox.label: Sync outbox
syncOutbox.description: Sync queue — retries, failures, and downstream delivery status.

reports.label: Reports
reports.description: Operational summaries by site and time window.

mobileCameraPair.label: Mobile camera pair
mobileCameraPair.description: Pair a mobile device to a lane for capture and heartbeat.

captureDebug.label: Capture debug
captureDebug.description: Monitor the capture feed and ALPR results for diagnostics.

subscriptions.label: Subscriptions
subscriptions.description: Manage parking subscriptions — vehicles, spots, and status.
subscriptions.createDescription: Create a new subscription record for a site, customer, plan, and validity window.
subscriptions.createFooter: Customer selection is manual in this wave because the current frontend shell does not yet expose a customer lookup endpoint.

validation.datesRequired: Please select start date and end date.
validation.startBeforeEnd: Start date must be on or before end date.

parkingLive.label: Parking live
parkingLive.description: Realtime occupancy — floor view, slot status, and drill-down.

settings.label: Settings
settings.description: Default context, auth and runtime diagnostics.

mobileCapture.label: Mobile capture
mobileCapture.description: Mobile UI for capturing and submitting images.

accountNav.label: Accounts
accountNav.description: Manage user accounts, profiles, and role assignments.

accounts.label: Accounts
accounts.description: Manage user accounts, profiles, and role assignments.

anonymous.label: Not signed in
anonymous.forbiddenCopy: You need an authenticated session before this screen can open.

ADMIN.label: Administrator
ADMIN.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the active administrator session scope.

SUPER_ADMIN.label: Super admin
SUPER_ADMIN.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the super-admin control surface.

SITE_ADMIN.label: Site admin
SITE_ADMIN.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the current site-admin workspace.

OPS.label: Operations
OPS.forbiddenCopy: This route is not part of your operations workspace policy.

MANAGER.label: Manager
MANAGER.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the manager review and planning workspace.

OPERATOR.label: Operator
OPERATOR.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the operator execution workspace.

GUARD.label: Guard
GUARD.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the guard lane and checkpoint workflow.

CASHIER.label: Cashier
CASHIER.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside cashier reporting and payment follow-up.

WORKER.label: Worker
WORKER.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the worker monitoring and background scope.

VIEWER.label: Viewer
VIEWER.forbiddenCopy: This route is outside the viewer read-only workspace.

auth.bootingDesc: Validating the current session, principal, and landing route.
auth.bootstrapFallbackDesc: The shell could not verify the user context required to open this workspace.
auth.forbiddenHint: Retry bootstrap first. If it keeps happening, sign in again and check API connectivity.

common.routeErrorDesc: A route-level error occurred. Go back home or open Settings to check your session and API.

login.title: Sign in to Parkly Console
login.subtitle: Your role after sign-in decides the workspace.
login.roleAutoDesc: Default flow. Your authenticated session decides the workspace.
login.compatDemoDesc: Compatibility override for demo {{role}} accounts only.
login.policyAccess: After sign-in or sign-out, redirects follow role and route policy.
login.envHint: Leave `VITE_API_BASE_URL` empty for local dev to use the Vite API proxy.
login.subtitleLong: Access comes from the authenticated backend principal. The login form does not grant permissions on its own.
login.demoRoleHint: Only use when the backend login API still runs in demo compatibility mode. Production should stay on backend-assigned role.
login.destRoleHome: Role home from the authenticated session.
login.destIfAllowed: {{href}} if your authenticated role allows it; otherwise the role's default workspace.
login.bootstrapTimeoutBody: If you see timeouts: start the API (port 3000), bind 0.0.0.0, or leave VITE_API_BASE_URL empty to use the Vite proxy.

loginPage.subtitle: Your role after sign-in decides the workspace.
loginPage.footer: Secure operations console · Role policy is enforced after authentication

laneContext.title: Lane context panel
laneContext.description: Subscribes to topology only. The provider supplies a scoped store with no cross-table React state injection.
laneContext.scopeFooter: This scope is released when leaving /run-lane — state is not shared with other screens.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.description: Auth shell diagnostics, runtime token, and default browser context.
settingsPage.cacheCleared: Local app cache cleared for this browser.

appearance.title: Appearance & language
appearance.description: Light/dark mode and UI language. Preferences are saved in this browser.
appearance.themeSystemDesc: Auto dark mode when OS prefers dark
appearance.themeLightDesc: Light mode, easy to see in bright light
appearance.themeDarkDesc: Dark mode, reduces eye strain at night
appearance.themeHint: System follows your OS light/dark preference.
appearance.languageHint: Vietnamese is the default; English for international partners.
appearance.languageViDesc: Vietnamese interface for day-to-day local operations.
appearance.languageEnDesc: English interface for cross-team and partner operations.

apiHealth.title: API connection check
apiHealth.description: Verify the session shell via /api/health and /api/auth/me.
apiHealth.successMsg: API connection and current session are both valid.

operator.currentSessionDesc: User context is loaded from backend auth. Route guards, topbar, and navigation follow this principal.
operator.defaultContextDesc: Save default site, lane, and direction to reduce repeated setup during shifts.

developer.title: Developer / debug
developer.description: Build info, token preview, and local cache keys.
developer.surfaceBody: User-auth shell routes use the browser access token. Mobile capture and device heartbeat use device-signed credentials only. A device 401 must be debugged on the mobile surface, not by logging the web operator out.
developer.clearLocalDesc: Clears Parkly app keys in browser storage. Does not affect the backend.
developer.refreshHint: Reload the page after clearing cache if the UI still shows stale state.
developer.trouble1: Shell auth issues: /api/auth/*, route bootstrap, user role guards, realtime 401.
developer.trouble2: Device-signed issues: /api/devices/heartbeat and /api/gate-reads/* signed by device secret.
developer.trouble3: Do not treat device signature errors as proof that the browser user session is expired.

runLaneCapture.noPreviewYet: No preview yet. Select an image to upload.
runLaneCapture.selectImageDesc: Click to select a file or paste an image from clipboard (Ctrl+V)
runLaneCapture.runAlpr: Running ALPR recognition (may take 30-60 seconds on CPU)...
runLaneCapture.pleaseWait: Please wait for processing to complete
runLaneCapture.noCandidates: No candidates yet — upload an image to recognize
runLaneCapture.uploaded: Uploaded {{filename}}. Running recognition (CPU mode — may take 30-90 seconds)…

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Shift dashboard — queue pressure, alerts, and system health at a glance.

incidents.title: Open incidents
incidents.helper: Incidents within the current overview scope.

occupancy.title: Occupancy rate
occupancy.helper: {{occupied}} of {{total}} spots. Click for live view.

activePresence.title: Active presence
activePresence.helper: Vehicles present across lanes in current scope.

lanePressure.title: Lane pressure
lanePressure.helperFallback: Lane stream not connected — showing snapshot.

reviewQueue.title: Review queue
reviewQueue.helperHasItems: Cases need an operator to claim or resolve.
reviewQueue.helperEmpty: No open cases in the current queue.

outboxDelivery.title: Outbox delivery
outboxDelivery.helperEmpty: No delivery failures in the current scope.

deviceHealth.title: Device health
deviceHealth.helperAttention: Offline or degraded devices in realtime snapshot.
deviceHealth.helperStable: Stable — no degraded or offline units.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Go directly to the screen you need to work on.

siteOverview.title: Site overview
siteOverview.description: Compare incident load, lane status, and open sessions across sites.

liveWatchlist.title: Lanes needing attention
liveWatchlist.description: Lanes with the worst health from the live stream.
liveWatchlist.noLanesDesc: Stream is active — no lanes in attention or offline state.
liveWatchlist.waitingDesc: The list will populate once the backend pushes lane_status_snapshot.

recentSessions.title: Recent sessions
recentSessions.description: Latest sessions — quickly spot lanes needing decision, error, or review.

dependencyStatus.title: Dependency status
dependencyStatus.description: Ready / degraded / unavailable per data source.

criticalIncidents.label: Critical incidents
criticalIncidents.summary: {{count}} critical issues need escalation before routine flow resumes.

offlineLanes.label: Offline lanes
offlineLanes.summary: {{count}} lanes offline. Restore lane connectivity before chasing lower-priority noise.

syncBacklog.label: Sync backlog
syncBacklog.summary: {{count}} failed outbox records need triage before handoff.

stableShift.label: Stable shift
stableShift.summary: No critical blockers detected. The board can stay focused on throughput and routine review handling.

topologyPage.loadFailedDesc: Check your connection and try refreshing the page.
topologyPage.subtitle: Shape each site's physical graph, device mapping, and heartbeat visibility in one operational workspace.
topologyPage.devicePoolHint: Drag unassigned devices into the canvas or inspect mapped hardware from the lane graph.
topologyPage.canvasDesc: Use a denser topology canvas so gates, lanes, and hardware relationships read like an operations map instead of an empty board.
topologyPage.dragDevicesHint: Drag devices from the pool into the lane canvas
topologyPage.clickLaneHint: Use the lane pencil to edit lane metadata
topologyPage.noUnassignedDevicesDesc: Every device in this site is already mapped to a lane.
topologyPage.noGatesTitle: No gates in this site yet
topologyPage.noGatesDesc: Create the first gate or lane to start shaping the site topology.

topologyDialog.createGateFailed: Failed to create gate. Please try again.
topologyDialog.createLaneFailed: Failed to create lane. Please try again.
topologyDialog.updateLaneFailed: Failed to update lane. Please try again.
topologyDialog.gateNeedsLane: Gates must have at least one lane.
topologyDialog.name: Name
topologyDialog.isPrimaryHint: Sets this device as the lane's main driver

empty.title: No session selected
empty.filteredOne: 1 session matches current filters ? pick one to inspect.
empty.filteredOther: {{count}} sessions match current filters ? pick one to inspect.
empty.description: Select a session from the list to view its details and run actions.

list.title: Sessions
list.emptyDescription: Try widening the time range or removing filters.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Filter by site, lane, direction, and status to locate the session to investigate.
filters.searchPlaceholder: Session ID, plate, lane, or status?
filters.searchAriaLabel: Search sessions by ID, plate, or status

barrier.title: Barrier override
barrier.defaultNote: Manual barrier open from Session History.
barrier.terminalUnavailable: Terminal state ? barrier override not available
barrier.confirmDescription: Records a manual review, decision, barrier command, and incident. Run only after on-site confirmation.

decisions.title: Decisions
decisions.empty: No decisions yet ? the session is likely still waiting.

media.title: Media strip
media.description: Groups image evidence by read event. Sessions without media still render cleanly without breaking the panel.
media.emptyDescription: RFID-only sessions or missing upstream images are expected and summarized cleanly here.

reviewQueuePage.doneEmptyHint: No RESOLVED or CANCELLED cases match this filter set. Try another site or time window.
reviewQueuePage.activeEmptyHint: Try adjusting filters or widening the time range.

detail.title: Review detail
detail.description: Verify session context, confirm the reason, and apply the action permitted for this case.
detail.empty: Select a case from the list to view detail.
detail.terminalDescription: This session has reached a terminal state.
detail.loadingLiveState: Verifying live session state? all actions stay locked until the authoritative detail returns.
detail.liveStateFailed: Could not verify live session state. {{error}}
detail.historyOnlyDescription: These cases are already resolved or cancelled. Switch to Needs action to claim or review a live case.
detail.shortcuts: Shortcuts: Up/Down select case, 1-4 actions, Ctrl+R refresh

form.title: Device pairing context
form.description: Select site, lane, and source device before creating a pair link, link copy, or QR handoff for the mobile device.
form.selectSiteDescription: Site to assign to the pairing link
form.selectLaneDescription: Lane that will receive capture from mobile
form.selectDeviceDescription: Device that will sign requests from the mobile surface
form.deviceSecretHint: Optional when using Create pair ? the server issues the pair token.

activePairs.title: Active pairs
activePairs.description: Stored in the browser local registry for quick re-opening or copying of pair links.
activePairs.empty: No pairs saved on this browser.
activePairs.removeDescription: This only removes the entry from this browser's local registry. The pair token on the server is not revoked; you can still use the link until it expires.

auditViewerPage.title: Audit Viewer
auditViewerPage.description: Trace request chains, actor changes, and entity snapshots without losing operational context.

correlationLookup.title: Correlation lookup
correlationLookup.description: Filter by request ID or correlation ID to follow a chain across lane actions and downstream systems.

beforeAfter.title: Before / after snapshot
beforeAfter.description: The detail panel highlights actor, entity, changed fields, and snapshots for faster operator review.

handoff.title: Cross-surface handoff
handoff.description: Jump from an audit record into outbox or session history using the same investigation identifiers.

list.title: Audit list
list.description: Scan actions, actors, entities, and correlations. Client-side keyword search applies to the current window only.
list.emptyDescription: Try widening filters or searching by request ID or correlation ID.

filters.title: Audit filters
filters.description: Keep request, correlation, entity, and actor state stable while tracing the event chain.

request.label: Request linked
request.description: Records that include a request ID

correlation.label: Correlation linked
correlation.description: Records that include a correlation ID

barrier.label: Barrier actions
barrier.description: Barrier open, timeout, or related actions

detail.title: Audit detail
detail.description: Inspect actor, entity, request chain, and snapshots before reading raw JSON.
detail.emptyDescription: Select a record to view request context, actor, and before/after snapshot.
detail.emptyHint: The detail panel will show correlation, request, actor, and diff summary here.
detail.noDiff: No clear diff keys were inferred from the current snapshot.

deviceHealthPage.title: Device Health
deviceHealthPage.description: Monitor heartbeat age, latency, and degraded devices by site and lane.

captureDebug.title: Capture Debug
captureDebug.description: Investigate image source and ALPR output when preview or capture is abnormal.

laneMonitor.title: Lane Monitor
laneMonitor.description: Cross-reference device faults against affected lanes.

syncOutbox.title: Sync Outbox
syncOutbox.description: Compare device faults with downstream delivery backlog.

howToRead.title: How to read this screen
howToRead.body: Start with offline or degraded device counts, then check heartbeat age and latency to decide what to triage first.

deviceHealth.title: Device Health
deviceHealth.description: Derived health reflects heartbeat age, capture status, and current lane assignment.
deviceHealth.noSnapshotDescription: Device health appears here once the backend publishes a snapshot. Resync to reopen the stream if data is missing.

runLaneLive.noLaneDescription: Select a site and lane to inspect realtime state.
runLaneLive.loadingDescription: Fetching the latest HTTP snapshot for this lane.
runLaneLive.lostContextDescription: Check site scope or the backend lane projection before continuing.
runLaneLive.healthyAttention: Lane health is stable and ready for normal processing.
runLaneLive.noLiveRowTitle: No live row for this lane
runLaneLive.noLiveRowDescription: Snapshot loaded but the lane was not found. Refresh to resync.

decision.title: Decision
decision.empty: No decision yet. Run the lane flow to receive one.

session.title: Session
session.empty: No session yet. Run the lane flow to create one.

actions.title: Actions
actions.resetNotice: Result reset. Preview and override were kept.

laneMonitorPage.title: Lane monitor
laneMonitorPage.description: Live lane health, barrier status, and latest session state. This is a read-only monitoring screen, not an action screen.

runLane.title: Run Lane
runLane.description: Switch to the operations screen when a lane needs a decision.

reviewQueue.title: Review Queue
reviewQueue.description: Go to the queue when a lane is waiting for manual confirmation.

sessionHistory.title: Session History
sessionHistory.description: Open Session History to review the timeline and evidence for a recent session.

readingPriority.title: Reading priority
readingPriority.description: Check aggregate health first, then review the latest session state and barrier status to identify lanes that need immediate action.

screenRole.title: Screen role
screenRole.description: Lane Monitor is for observation and fault isolation. Decision actions should be taken in Run Lane or Review Queue.

captureDebugPage.title: Capture Debug
captureDebugPage.description: Monitor OCR preview, capture feed, and mapping summary to identify ingest errors or camera mismatches.

mobilePair.title: Mobile Camera Pair
mobilePair.description: Create QR codes and pair links for mobile devices from desktop.

mobileCapture.title: Mobile Capture
mobileCapture.description: Open the mobile surface to submit images, preview, and heartbeat.

runLane.title: Run Lane
runLane.description: Switch to the main operations screen for decisions and barrier actions.

summary.title: Event mapping summary
summary.empty: Select a row in the capture feed to view context mapping.

captureDebugPage.footnote: Capture Debug is for reading input signals and OCR preview only. Business decisions should be made in Run Lane or Review Queue.

dashboardPage.title: Operations dashboard
dashboardPage.description: A consolidated handoff view for lane health, review queue, device health, and outbox pressure.

laneMonitor.title: Lane monitor
laneMonitor.description: Read barrier health, latest sessions, and live pressure before acting.

reviewQueue.title: Review queue
reviewQueue.description: Track manual decisions that need acknowledgement or assignment.

deviceHealth.title: Device health
deviceHealth.description: Check heartbeat drift, degraded devices, and capture dependencies.

outbox.title: Outbox triage
outbox.description: Inspect failed deliveries before operator handoff or escalation.

sessionDetail.title: Session handoff
sessionDetail.description: Use Session History when an operator needs to walk back from a live alert into evidence and timeline.

devicesPage.title: Devices
devicesPage.description: Inspect live topology, heartbeat status, and device mapping before troubleshooting onsite hardware.

topology.title: Live topology
topology.description: Site, gate, lane, and mapped device inventory with the latest heartbeat status.
topology.empty: No topology is available in the current scope.
topology.noMappedDevices: No mapped devices on this lane.

realityCheck.title: Reality check
realityCheck.description: Use this panel to confirm whether issues come from topology, heartbeat flow, or backend aggregation.

api.title: Topology API
api.description: Topology is built from the same site, gate, lane, and device APIs used by the admin surface.

heartbeat.title: Heartbeat coverage
heartbeat.description: A device without heartbeat data can still exist in topology, but it should be treated as unknown until the next signed report.

aggregate.title: Aggregate gaps
aggregate.description: Compare device counts, mapped roles, and stale heartbeat age to spot wiring or provisioning drift.

links.title: Cross-check links
links.description: Use Device Health, Capture Debug, and Run Lane together when you need to prove whether the fault is sensor-side or workflow-side.

gatePage.title: Gate route has moved
gatePage.description: The old gate surface now redirects to clearer role-specific routes so operations and diagnostics stay separated.

cleanup.title: Cleanup note
cleanup.description: Keep this route only long enough to avoid dead imports and broken bookmarks, then remove it once every entry point has migrated.

gateEventsPage.title: Gate Events Monitor has been replaced
gateEventsPage.description: The old mixed surface has been split into focused routes for device onboarding and capture diagnostics.

whySplit.title: Why split
whySplit.description: Pair QR handles device onboarding. Capture Debug handles ingest and OCR observation. Keeping them together made QA and operations harder to control.

reportsPage.title: Reports
reportsPage.description: Summary stays scoped by site and time window so bookmarks, refreshes, and operator handoff remain stable.

days.description_one: Most recent {{count}} day in the aggregation window
days.description_other: Most recent {{count}} days in the aggregation window

operatorNote.title: Operator note
operatorNote.description: Compare this summary against queue, lane monitor, and subscriptions before handing off anomalies.

empty.title: No summary available
empty.description: Select a valid site and load the summary. No data appears until the backend returns a result for that site.

breakdown.title: Summary breakdown
breakdown.description: Showing data exactly as returned by the backend.

entry.title: ENTRY
entry.description: Vehicle entries in the report window.

exit.title: EXIT
exit.description: Vehicle exits in the report window.

items.groupByDirection: The backend groups gate events by direction over the selected time window.
items.noGateLaneBreakdown: The current endpoint does not break data down by gate or lane.
items.dependencyVsEmpty: Dependency failures and empty data are separated so operators can tell the difference.

quickFacts.title: Quick facts
quickFacts.window: Time window used by the report query.
quickFacts.analytics: These two figures represent all analytics currently exposed by the API.

diagnostics.missingSecretDetail: Device secret is required for device-signed requests when no pair token is active.
diagnostics.missingFieldDetail: {{field}} must be present in the live form before heartbeat or capture can be signed.
diagnostics.manualOverrideDetail: This is expected after editing device or lane fields. The current form wins for signed actions in this tab.
diagnostics.pairTokenMissingDetail: Requests still use the live device context, but traceability back to a pairing session is weaker.
diagnostics.queryPrefillDetail: URL parameters are read only at mount. Later edits in this tab are not overwritten by stale query values.

validation.missingSecret: Device secret is required when no pair token is active.

errors.nothingToSendMessage: At least one image or plate hint is required.
errors.deviceSignatureInvalidMessage: Backend rejected the signed request. The current device secret or device code does not match the registered device.
errors.deviceAuthenticationFailedMessage: Backend rejected the signed device request. Re-check the current device code and device secret shown in the form.
errors.deviceAuthHint: Open the effective context card, compare the live form state against the registered device, then retry heartbeat or capture in the same tab.
errors.strictPlateMessage: Detected plate does not match the supported Vietnam plate format.
errors.strictPlateSuggestion: Try using plateHint or retake the image with a clearer plate.
errors.imageHintMessage: Add an image or a plate hint so the system can identify the vehicle.
errors.pairTokenInvalidMessage: The pair token is expired or invalid. Scan a fresh QR code from Mobile Camera Pair.

mobileCapturePage.title: Mobile capture
mobileCapturePage.descriptionPairToken: Pair token is active, so no device secret is required. Choose an image and optionally enter a plate hint.
mobileCapturePage.descriptionNoPairToken: Query parameters only prefill once. The form below is the source of truth for heartbeat and capture.
mobileCapturePage.captureCardDescription: Choose an image and optionally enter a plate hint. The plate hint takes priority over OCR. Use the pair token for capture and heartbeat when available.
mobileCapturePage.deviceContextDescription: Edit the values used by heartbeat and capture in this panel.

placeholders.deviceSecretPair: Not required when using a pair token

mobileCapturePage.deviceSecretHintPair: When the page is opened from a pair link or QR code, heartbeat and capture use the pair token and do not need a device secret.
mobileCapturePage.deviceSecretHintLocal: Only required when no pair token is used. Configure the API with DEVICE_CAPTURE_DEFAULT_SECRET or DEVICE_CAPTURE_SECRET_<deviceCode> in .env.
mobileCapturePage.footnote: Edge camera surface signed by the live device context. Query prefill is seed-only and does not mutate this tab after mount.

status.heartbeatHintPair: This heartbeat used the active pair token and the current live context.
status.heartbeatHintLocal: This heartbeat used the same live form state shown in the effective context card.
status.captureHintPair: This capture used the active pair token and current live context.
status.captureHintLocal: This capture used the same live device context as heartbeat.

mobileCaptureContext.title: Effective device context
mobileCaptureContext.description: Heartbeat and capture use the live form shown here rather than stale query params.
mobileCaptureContext.consistent: Current live context is internally consistent.
mobileCaptureContext.consistentDescription: Heartbeat and capture will sign with the same device scope.

mobileCaptureJournal.title: Ops journal
mobileCaptureJournal.description: Preview, heartbeat, and capture logs from the latest actions.

mobileCaptureReceipt.title: Capture receipt
mobileCaptureReceipt.description: Authoritative response from the backend after a signed ALPR capture is accepted.

accountPage.pageDesc: Manage HR profiles, customers, credentials, and role assignments.

profile.changePasswordDesc: Update your account password. Minimum 8 characters.
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

admin.editUserDesc: Update username, role, or reset password for {{username}}.
admin.setSiteScopesDesc: Assign or remove site access scopes for {{username}}.
admin.noUsersDesc: Try adjusting the filters or create a new user.
admin.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters
admin.usernameInvalid: Username must be alphanumeric, dash, or underscore
admin.newPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password
admin.passwordLeaveBlank: Leave blank to keep the current password unchanged
admin.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
admin.createUserDesc: Create a new user account with a role and optional site scopes.

customers.pageDesc: View, add, edit, and remove customers along with their vehicles, RFID cards, and subscriptions.
customers.noCustomersDesc: Try adjusting the filters or add a new customer.
customers.confirmDeleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete customer "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

form.fullNameRequired: Please enter a full name (min 2 characters)
